description: Xenodot Forge hooks — block destructive git/shell ops before they run, grant sub-agent game/library edits so backgrounded workers aren't auto-denied, re-inject the caveman terse-output rule on every sub-agent tool call so it survives long turns, and log sub-agent rtk-prefix usage (observe-only). (rtk enforcement itself is the user's own global hook, not shipped here — this only measures whether sub-agents follow the instruction.)
